query:
SELECT ac.name as category, COUNT(*) as count 
FROM animals a 
JOIN animal_categories ac ON a.categoryId = ac.id 
WHERE a.deletedAt IS NULL 
GROUP BY ac.name ORDER BY count DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2Miqjapjuirru1Z.b9867fc13f8f --database boyWMBM5odtbpptCLrtK7n --execute
